title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Unilever Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Unilever Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at Hindustan Unilever Global Group are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hindustan Unilever Global Group:
Hindustan Unilever Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever Global Group!
